_meta.note: BLESSED regression baselines for library/zoomy_jax/tests/regression. EMPTY until the user blesses candidates: any absent key makes its regression test SKIP with 'awaiting user blessing'. Candidates are generated by running the regression tier with $ZOOMY_JAX_CANDIDATE_BASELINES pointing at a scratchpad file; promotion = user approval, then copy the measured entries here (plus recording host / core+jax shas below) and commit. A baseline detects CHANGE, not WRONGNESS (re-bless protocol, mirroring zoomy_core/tests/goldens).
